deliverables: ClinicalTrials.gov query excludes `COMPLETED` when the card represents active trials.
Hook test asserts active-only status filter.
success_criteria: A failing-first test confirms the URL does not contain `COMPLETED`.
testable_behaviors: Research tab ClinicalTrials card fetches recruiting, active-not-recruiting, and enrolling-by-invitation studies only.
scope_boundaries: Do not add a completed-trials toggle in this sprint.
Do not change PubMed, UniProt, or STRING query behavior.
